name: security-bot
description: GitHub App that automates security code review for every Pull Request — scans for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities with inline comments and severity labels
author: hamdyelbatal122 <hamdy.elbatal@gmail.com>

scripts.setup:quick: npm run setup && npm run test:local
scripts.lint: node --check index.js && node --check src/security-scanner.js && node --check src/repo-automation.js && node --check scripts/setup.js && node --check scripts/test-local.js && node --check scripts/demo-scan.js && node --check scripts/connect-url.js
